auth.passwordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

plans.emptyPlanTitle: You don't have a plan yet
plans.emptyPlanSubtitle: Create a new plan or copy an existing one with a code.
plans.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete?
plans.nameStepDescription: Start by naming the day so it is easy to recognize inside the plan.
plans.name: Name
plans.selectExercisesDescription: Add exercises by typing a name directly or open the catalog and browse by body part.
plans.startTypingExercises: Start typing an exercise name to add it directly to the plan day.
plans.noExercisesSelected: Add at least one exercise before continuing.
plans.configureExercisesDescription: Adjust each exercise and set the execution order before saving the day.
plans.invalidExerciseConfig: Each exercise must have at least 1 series and reps filled in.
plans.summaryDescription: Review the final exercise list and save the plan day when everything looks right.

training.highestRank: You are on the highest rank
training.noTraining: You cant add training, because you dont have plan or plan days!
training.invalidScoresMessage: Please make sure every score is a number and not empty.
training.missingTrainingContext: The selected training day or gym is missing. Close the flow and start adding the training again.
training.noDays: There is no training days available!
training.addExerciseToCurrentTraining: Add exercise to the current training
training.planLoadErrorMessage: We couldn't load your training plan. Please try again later.

gym.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete?

tutorial.navigationLockedDescription: Complete it step by step to unlock the remaining views.

gymIntro.title: Your Arenas
gymIntro.description: Every gym is different. Add many of them - home gym, chain gym, or outdoor spot. This way your progress is tied to the exact place and equipment.

gymCreate.title: Base Setup
gymCreate.description: You can add multiple places: Home, chain gym, or outdoor. It matters because results are filtered by the selected gym - different equipment means different results.

planCreate.title: Foundation of Form
planCreate.description: Chaos does not support results. Build a specific split (e.g. FBW, Split) to give your training structure.

planDayCreate.title: Weekly Split
planDayCreate.description: Break your plan into training days (e.g. Chest + Biceps). Add your first day and choose the exercises you will run in that session.

training.title: Battle Mode
training.description: Ready to train? Tap here, choose a day from your plan, and simply tick off your sets while you go.

trainingView.title: Performance Context
trainingView.description: Log weight and reps. This training is a demo - tapping "Finish" will not save it to history. It is only used to complete the tutorial.

gym.title: Arena Management
gym.description: Add and edit your gyms. Keep in mind exercise results (e.g. bench records) are tied to a specific location. Machines and setups vary across gyms.

plan.title: Command Center
plan.description: This is where you keep all your training plans. The active plan is the one used by default when you enter training.

planDay.title: Day Builder
planDay.description: Configure this training day: set a name, add exercises from your catalog, and define target sets.

training.title: Launch Panel
training.description: Before start, always set context: Where are you training? What are you training (which plan day)? You can also start without a plan and add exercises on the fly.

trainingView.title: Session Log
trainingView.description: Save weight and reps for each completed set. Finish the workout with the bottom button to push data into your stats and records.

history.noSessionForDay: You dont have training session this day!

records.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete?
records.noRecordsYet: You don't have any saved records yet.

updateDialog.title: Update required
updateDialog.description: A new version ({{version}}) is required to keep using the app.
updateDialog.openLinkError: Could not open the update link.

profile.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete your account?

createExercise.nameAndBodyPartRequired: Name and body part are required!
createExercise.deleteExerciseMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this exercise?
